questions: What is the correct implementation sequence for the CLI Phase 2b library commands?
How should library item resolution be implemented?
What module structure should the library commands use?
How critical is the SKILL.md update for agent discoverability?

answers.answer: The CLI implementation follows a 9-step sequence: (1) resolution utility, (2) module router, (3) list command, (4) show command, (5) comments router, (6) comments list, (7) comments post, (8) register in dispatcher, (9) SKILL.md update. Resolution utility comes first as all commands depend on it. SKILL.md is last but critical.
evidence: ticket.md Research Report Phase 2b implementation steps

answers.answer: Library item resolution adapts the resolve-ticket.ts pattern (128 lines) with 3 strategies: (1) cuid detection (/^c[a-z0-9]{24}$/ — exact id match), (2) ticket shortId (/^[A-Z]+-\d+$/ — match against item's ticket shortId), (3) title fallback (case-insensitive substring). Fetches full item list via GET /library/items then matches client-side.

A new src/library/ module with its own router (index.ts) dispatching to list, show, and comments subcommands. Comments is a nested router (comments.ts) dispatching to comments-list and comments-post. This mirrors the src/comments/ module pattern but is a distinct module because library comments have different API endpoints, resolution, and unique features (section anchoring, ratings).
evidence: tech-research/tech-research.md: new module vs extending comments decision

answers.answer: The SKILL.md update is critical for agent discoverability. Agents read SKILL.md to discover available CLI capabilities — without this update, the library feature is invisible to automated workflows. The update adds all 4 command variants to the Available Commands table and a Library section to Common Workflows.
evidence: skill-content/SKILL.md: Available Commands table at lines 32-50
tech-research/tech-research.md: SKILL.md critical for agent discoverability

statement: The CLI Phase 2b plan consists of 9 atomic steps creating 7 new files and modifying 2 files. The plan creates a new src/library/ module following the established comments module router pattern, adapts the resolve-ticket.ts 3-strategy resolution for library items, and documents all commands in SKILL.md for agent discoverability. Verification includes 3 required checks: build, library list execution, and library show execution. No new npm dependencies.
